prompt:
Main Subject and Composition: The image presents a surreal and dark digital collage-style artistic composition. In the center right, the face from the first attached image dominates, fused with complex textures. To its left, ethereally integrated and in shadow, is the profile of another face, that is, the second attached image.

Details of the Frontal Face: The right half of this face (from the viewer's perspective) shows two realistic and expressive eyes, skin with a stone or bronze texture, and superimposed fragments of ancient texts and geometric patterns.

The rest of the face fades away.

Background and Textures: The entire background is predominantly black and textured, imitating an aged, cracked, and dust-spattered canvas. Technical diagrams, abstract mathematical equations, ancient manuscripts, and grids of dots are subtly integrated into the darkness.

Lighting Element: In the lower half, a line of an electrocardiogram (heartbeat or ECG signal) stands out horizontally from side to side, glowing intensely with a golden or liquid fire color. Two of the pulse's highest peaks align vertically with the two halves of the main face.

Color Palette: Extremely minimalist and dramatic, composed almost entirely of dark tones: blacks, earthy browns, aged bronze, and the bright orange/gold flash of the electrocardiogram.

Uses a 1:1 aspect ratio.
